title: Sour Sweet Ukrainian Masarepa Crumble
description: A kid-friendly and raw-friendly sour sweet Ukrainian dish featuring yellow masarepa that is caramelized and served as a crumble.
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Grease a baking dish with coconut oil or vegetable shortening.
In a mixing bowl, combine masarepa, sugar, salt, and lemon juice. Stir until well combined and a crumbly texture forms.
Transfer the mixture into the prepared baking dish. If desired, sprinkle unsweetened shredded coconut on top of the crumble for additional flavor and texture.
Bake in preheated oven for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown and crisp on top.
Remove from oven and let it cool slightly before serving with a side of fresh lemon slices for extra sourness, if desired.
